description: I'm sorry to bother you, sir, but I do think this one's warranted. Iona, Shield of Emeria is a canonical-MTG-named-character — Wizards' Zendikar 2009 originating legendary printing plus multiple reprints, banned in Legacy per Wizards' canonical format-rules, with MTG Wiki canonical pages anchoring the seer-who-kept-her-sight archangel-of-Emeria character-frame. Two corpus Iona-named-card anchors (Iona's Blessing OGW-21 + Iona's Judgment CMR-25), each anchoring a distinct canonical operating-mode register (blessing-deployment + judgment-deployment) per the master-roshi precedent for dual-register-canonical-coverage commissioning at the two-anchor threshold-relaxed-precedent. Single-hub attribution [stewardship] per Potion-rule discipline — the canon supports stewardship at archangel-tier clearly and unambiguously; labor and rebellion attributions would be analytical-pressure-outrun-by-canon. I hope this is useful. The canonical-tragic-arc reading (Iona's color-naming barrier outmatched by the colorless Eldrazi) is body-narrated as canonical-evidence-grounded, not promoted to additional hub-attribution. The eldrazi adversary-coupling and the kor sibling-resistance cross-edges are the canonical relationship structure per MTG Wiki's Iona page.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Iona, Shield of Emeria — canonical character page]
[MTG Wiki: Linvala, Keeper of Silence — canonical sibling archangel]
[Scryfall: Iona's Blessing flavor_text — direct Iona voice quote]
[Scryfall: Iona's Judgment flavor_text + originating Worldwake printing]
[Wizards: Banned and Restricted — Iona Legacy banning]
notes: Master Roshi precedent (≥2 anchors with dual-register-canonical-coverage) applied. Acerola precedent (≥1 anchor for sufficient canonical-significance) clears at the floor.
Stewardship hub attribution single-hub per Potion-rule. No analytical-pressure-outrun-by-canon. The canonical-tragic-arc reading is body-narrated, not hub-promoted.

Future legendary-Iona-card acquisition (Zendikar 2009 originating printing or any of the multiple reprints) extends appears_on directly. Currently 0 legendary-Iona-card-itself corpus anchors; canonical-character-frame load-bearing at two auxiliary-card anchors per the threshold-relaxed-precedent.
Linvala-Keeper-of-Silence sibling-archangel sub-node deferred at 0 corpus anchors; future-pointer recorded.
